title: teucrium montanum subsp. montanum
intro: Teucrium montanum subsp. montanum, also known as Alpine germander, is a subspecies of perennial herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been shown to aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Teucrium montanum subsp. montanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its ability to act as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
